name: ovis_image_text_synth coverage probe — typography axis
note: 학습 캡션 템플릿(A {장면} with the exact visible text "{텍스트}".)을 따르되, 학습셋에 없는 것만 넣었다. (1) 폰트·서체 서술 — 학습셋 0% (2) 신규 텍스트 — 학습셋 106개 단어와 미충돌 (3) 신규 장면 — 학습셋 9종 밖.

prompts.prompt: A letterpress print on cream paper with the exact visible text "HARBOR" set in a high-contrast serif typeface.
An enamel sign on a tiled wall with the exact visible text "ZENITH" set in a geometric sans-serif typeface.
A bakery window decal with the exact visible text "Rosemary" written in flowing script lettering.
A folded notecard on linen with the exact visible text "thank you" in loose handwritten lowercase.
A wedding invitation on textured card with the exact visible text "VELVET" in ornate calligraphy.
A brewery label on a dark bottle with the exact visible text "IRONSIDE" in blackletter gothic type.
A railway platform board with the exact visible text "DEPARTURE" in tall condensed uppercase letters.
A terminal screen on a beige computer with the exact visible text "SYS_READY" in green monospace type.
A wooden crate side with the exact visible text "CARGO 47" spray-painted through a stencil.
A retro arcade cabinet screen with the exact visible text "LEVEL UP" in blocky pixel font.
A pool float tag with the exact visible text "Splash" in rounded bubble lettering.
A sheet music cover with the exact visible text "Andante" in slanted italic serif.
A car badge on a black hood with the exact visible text "OVERDRIVE" in polished chrome lettering.
A vinyl record sleeve with the exact visible text "SUNSET FM" in a pink to orange gradient fill.
A skate deck underside with the exact visible text "HOLLOW" in outlined letters with no fill.
A leather notebook cover with the exact visible text "ATELIER" embossed and debossed into the surface.
A canvas cap front with the exact visible text "SUMMIT" stitched in raised embroidery thread.
A carved wooden trail marker with the exact visible text "WOODLAND" cut into the grain.
A ceramic mug on a shelf with the exact visible text "BrightSide" in mixed upper and lower case.
A cinema marquee at dusk with the exact visible text "MIDNIGHT EXPRESS" in bold backlit letters.
A barbershop mirror decal with the exact visible text "EST. 1968" in gold leaf lettering.
A field journal cover with the exact visible text "FIELD" above the exact visible text "NOTES" in two stacked lines.
A subway tile mosaic with the exact visible text "PLATFORM 9" laid in ceramic tiles.
A fruit crate stamp on raw wood with the exact visible text "ORCHARD" in faded ink.
